name: Solitar: Retro Picks
short_description: Solitar Retro Picks is a collection of 20 classic solitaire games with a nostalgic 8-bit look inspired by the early PC era. Ideal for audiobooks, podcasts, or binge-watching your favorite series.
detailed_description:
A Return to the Classics

Solitar Retro Picks is a collection of 20 classic solitaire games with a nostalgic 8-bit look inspired by the early PC era. Ideal for audiobooks, podcasts, or binge-watching your favorite series.

Key Features

♠️ 7 × Classic Card Games - Alaska, Canfield, FreeCell, Forty Thieves, Klondike, Spider & Yukon

♦️ 7 × Specialty Card Games - Accordion, Addiction, Monte Carlo, Pyramid, Poker Squares, Scorpion & TriPeaks

♣️ 2 × Versus CPU Card Games - Gin Rummy & Hearts

♥️ 4 × Puzzle & Arcade Games - Minesweeper, Nuclei, Pipe Fever & Mahjong

🔋 Light on system resources, well-suited for Steam Deck and laptops

💾 Solvable and random modes for supported games, with auto-save, seed sharing, and optional unlimited undo

📜 Built-in rules for every game, plus a solution viewer for difficult seeds

A Complete Experience

Solitar Retro Picks is a passion project built to be straightforward and complete. When you purchase the game, you’re getting everything. No hidden requirements. No extra costs.

🚫 Subscriptions - Buy it once and own it permanently

🚫 Advertisements - No interruptions

🚫 Microtransactions - No coins, boosters, or hidden costs

🚫 DLC - The full collection is included. No paid add-ons

Visual Customization

🎨 Cards & Tiles - Multiple card fronts (including high-visibility), backs, and tile styles

🖼️ Tabletop - Custom table backgrounds and border styles

Steam Integration

🎮 Steam Deck & Controllers - Full support for controller, mouse, or keyboard

☁️ Steam Cloud - Sync your progress and settings across devices

🏆 Achievements - Earn achievements for supported games and modes
